title: Core: register HtmlAdapter in Rust document format registry
description:
Add HtmlAdapter to crates/jit/src/document/adapter.rs implementing the DocFormatAdapter trait.

Requirements:
1. id() → "html"
2. supports_path() → extension html or htm (case-insensitive).
3. detect() → starts with <!DOCTYPE html or contains <html (case-insensitive).
4. scan_assets() → coarse extraction of src and href attribute values. Exclude external URLs (http/https); exclude mailto:; exclude anchor-only (#...). Regex-based is acceptable for v1 — asset scanning is not on the critical path for this story.
5. Register HtmlAdapter in AdapterRegistry::with_builtins().
6. Unit tests: extension match (positive for .html/.htm; negative for .md); content detection (reveal.js fixture hit; plain text miss); asset-scan smoke test on a reveal.js fixture.

Acceptance:
- jit document add <issue> <path/to/file.html> records format: "html" in the stored DocumentReference.
- Existing MarkdownAdapter behavior unchanged.
- No migration of existing stored DocumentReference.format values — new additions only. A retroactive fix-up is tracked as a separate follow-up.

Part of story abfd6016. Independent of the other tasks (a/b/c).
